title: BLUEPRINTS of LIFE
description:
B L U E P R I N T S  of  LI F E
meeting strangers – Dem Leben auf's Maul geschaut

"Immer wieder fragen, worauf es ankommt"

Interview Jürg Da Vaz – Andras Peterffy 2005 - 2021
ungarisch, englisch, deutsch


WHAT MAKES A PICTURE?
Zwei Herzen in einer Brust, die in beiden Welten schlägt.

Andras Peterffy, Editor in Chief, Hungarian Television:
"There is a flight to the moon you should be the first who discovers with camera because probably the impression would be much better than if a technician or...I don't want to send you to the moon, but eh if there is a chance I will accompany you..."


C O M M E N T S
Markus:
Grandioses Interview
Was hab ich gesagt: der liebe Gott hat Dir weiss was gegeben.
Den einen gibt er es im Schlaf,
Den andern gibt er zu wenig!

Andras:
It is a very enjoyable (self)portrait, very rich and very precisely structured.
It was a good decision to reconstruct the "Film-globe-trotter"  since it was an occasional tv program introducing your film-series in MTV Filmidő.
This version  is more philosophical; an essay on "what is film".
So it was worth polishing the diamond. 
It is also a good appetizer. Someone can easily feel curious to find the complete films which here are only referred to.
So congratulate to both of you, this is a Swiss-Hungarian invention : THE DISTANCE EDITING
